message:
test(extensions): add tool conformance tests for dispatcher hostcalls

Add ~950 lines of integration tests that exercise built-in tool dispatch
through the extension JS runtime, verifying the pi.tool() hostcall path
end-to-end.

New tests:
- dispatcher_tool_write_creates_file_and_resolves: pi.tool("write")
  creates file on disk, verifies content
- dispatcher_tool_ls_lists_directory: pi.tool("ls") returns both temp
  files in listing
- dispatcher_tool_grep_searches_content: pi.tool("grep") finds matching
  lines in a file with pattern
- dispatcher_tool_edit_modifies_file_content: pi.tool("edit") performs
  old_text/new_text replacement
- dispatcher_ui_multiple_calls_captured: two pi.ui() calls dispatched,
  TestUiHandler captures both with correct methods
- NullUiHandler test: pi.ui() resolves to null when no handler set

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
